    Spring Cloud Task Build 5.0.2 API

    Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.spring
    Single-step batch job sample application for Spring Cloud Task.
    io.spring.cloud
    Batch events sample application for Spring Cloud Task.
    io.spring.configuration
    Configuration classes for the multiple datasources sample application.
    io.spring.task
    Task implementation classes for the multiple datasources sample application.
    io.spring.taskobservations
    Task observations sample application for Spring Cloud Task.
    org.springframework.cloud.task
    Base package for spring cloud task.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.autoconfigure
    Auto-configuration classes for Spring Cloud Task single-step batch jobs.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.autoconfigure.flatfile
    Auto-configuration classes for flat file item readers and writers in single-step batch jobs.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.autoconfigure.jdbc
    Auto-configuration classes for JDBC item readers and writers in single-step batch jobs.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.autoconfigure.kafka
    Auto-configuration classes for Kafka item readers and writers in single-step batch jobs.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.autoconfigure.rabbit
    Auto-configuration classes for RabbitMQ item readers and writers in single-step batch jobs.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.configuration
    Configuration classes for Spring Cloud Task Batch integration.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.handler
    Handler components for Spring Cloud Task Batch integration.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener
    Stream-based batch listener components for Spring Cloud Task.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener.support
    Support classes for stream-based batch listener components in Spring Cloud Task.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration
    Interfaces for configuring Spring Cloud Task and a default implementations.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration.observation
    Observation support for Spring Cloud Task configuration.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.listener
    Stream-based task lifecycle listener support for Spring Cloud Task.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.listener.annotation
    Annotation-based listener support for Spring Cloud Task.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.repository
    Core repository interfaces and classes for Spring Cloud Task.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.repository.dao
    Interface DAO and default implementations for storing and retrieving data for tasks from a repository.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.repository.database
    Database-specific components for Spring Cloud Task repository.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.repository.database.support
    Support classes for database-specific Spring Cloud Task repository implementations.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.repository.support
    Classes used for setting up and supporting a task repositories.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.timestamp
    Sample timestamp task application for Spring Cloud Task.
